title: Gift Card Purchase Info
description: What details are needed for buying, using, and redeeming gift cards?
narrative: The user intends to purchase a retail gift card (physical or electronic) and seeks comprehensive information on available options, minimum amounts, delivery methods (print or email), validity periods, and the redemption process on the vendor’s website. Relevance requires coverage of gift‑card policies, ordering steps, and usage instructions; it should not include unrelated card‑game references or non‑retail gift‑card formats.

title: Lamb Tagine
description: User wants a detailed recipe for cooking lamb tagine.
narrative: The user is looking for a traditional or modern lamb tagine recipe, including a full ingredient list, step‑by‑step cooking instructions, cooking time, difficulty level, and possible variations. Relevant documents should provide clear guidance on how to prepare the dish, what spices to use, cooking method (oven, stovetop, slow cooker), and any cultural notes. Non‑relevant documents are those that do not contain recipe instructions or ingredient details.

title: Lotus low‑cost hybrid
description: I want to learn about Lotus’s low‑cost hybrid family sedan, its specifications, pricing, and environmental performance.

Broad Lotus car news or unrelated Lotus products (e.g., wheel centers) are not relevant.
